reason: Frontend task entry point and checklist for verification.
Verify Settings/Git UI follows local component patterns.
Verify AI preferences and modes are persisted through the expected state flow.
Verify shared AI provider/mode types remain safe and compatible.
Verify frontend quality, maintainability, and scope control.
Verify preload bridge errors are clear and user-visible.
Verify API key and AI request handling does not expose secrets.
Verify the implemented AI settings UX matches researched MVP patterns.
